C1.name: Conflict intake
C1.definition: The system must allow perturbations that challenge A(I).

C2.name: Marker separation
C2.definition: Authority A(I) must be distinguishable from intuition I.

C3.name: Revision budget
C3.definition: There must exist an update budget that can pay revision cost.

C4.name: Rollback handle
C4.definition: The system must retain at least a minimal handle to alternative routes.

C5.name: Maintenance mode
C5.definition: Periodic maintenance is required to prevent runaway authority debt.

core_claim: Editability is not openness as an attitude; it is a structural property of finite-cost authority revision.
